title: BEM-542.2 real orchestrator harness
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')

cycle = 'bem542-real-orchestrator-test'
# Incoming task to curator. The orchestrator harness must derive next role from this record.
intake = {
  'record_type': 'curator_intake',
  'cycle_id': cycle,
  'trace_id': 'bem542_real_input_001',
  'source': 'gpt',
  'task_type': 'development',
  'title': 'Create practical orchestrator artifact',
  'objective': 'Verify that orchestrator decision derives next role from task_type and state, not from hardcoded full role chain.',
  'created_at': '2026-05-17 | 14:13 (UTC+3)',
  'blocker': None
}
(base/'curator_input_task.json').write_text(json.dumps(intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(intake, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# Real internal orchestrator decision logic: read latest cycle records and compute next role.
records = []
for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    try:
        rec = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    if rec.get('cycle_id') == cycle:
        records.append(rec)
latest = records[-1] if records else None
if latest is None:
    next_role = 'curator'
    reason = 'no_records'
    status = 'blocked'
    blocker = {'code':'NO_CYCLE_RECORDS'}
elif latest.get('record_type') == 'curator_intake':
    t = latest.get('task_type')
    if t == 'development':
        next_role = 'analyst'
        reason = 'development_requires_analysis'
    elif t == 'audit':
        next_role = 'auditor'
        reason = 'audit_task_routes_to_auditor'
    elif t == 'hotfix':
        next_role = 'auditor'
        reason = 'hotfix_requires_audit_before_executor'
    else:
        next_role = 'curator'
        reason = 'unknown_task_type_returns_to_curator'
    status = 'completed'
    blocker = None
elif latest.get('record_type') == 'analysis' and latest.get('status') == 'completed':
    next_role = 'auditor'
    reason = 'analysis_completed_requires_audit'
    status = 'completed'
    blocker = None
elif latest.get('record_type') == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR':
    next_role = 'executor'
    reason = 'audit_pass_to_executor'
    status = 'completed'
    blocker = None
elif latest.get('record_type') == 'execution' and latest.get('status') == 'completed':
    next_role = 'auditor'
    reason = 'execution_completed_requires_final_audit'
    status = 'completed'
    blocker = None
else:
    next_role = 'curator'
    reason = 'default_to_curator'
    status = 'completed'
    blocker = None

decision = {
  'record_type': 'role_orchestrator_decision',
  'cycle_id': cycle,
  'source': 'internal_orchestrator',
  'from_role': 'curator',
  'to_role': next_role,
  'status': status,
  'decision': 'route_to_' + next_role,
  'reason': reason,
  'input_record_type': None if latest is None else latest.get('record_type'),
  'input_task_type': None if latest is None else latest.get('task_type'),
  'artifact_path': 'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542/orchestrator_decision_1.json',
  'commit_sha': None,
  'blocker': blocker,
  'created_at': '2026-05-17 | 14:13 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'orchestrator_decision_1.json').write_text(json.dumps(decision, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(decision, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:13 (UTC+3)'
state['curator_status'] = 'ASSIGNED' if blocker is None else 'BLOCKED'
state['active_role'] = 'role_orchestrator'
state['next_role'] = next_role
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-542.2','title':'Real orchestrator decision harness','status':status}
state['blocker'] = blocker
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:13 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-542.2 orchestrator decision from curator intake','status':status,'next_role':next_role,'reason':reason})
state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem542_2_real_orchestrator_harness.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-542.2 | Real Orchestrator Decision Harness | ' + ('PASS' if blocker is None else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:13 (UTC+3)\n\n## Что проверено\nОркестратор прочитал вход curator intake из exchange file и сам вывел next_role на основании `task_type=development`.\n\n## Decision\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| input_record_type | ' + str(decision.get('input_record_type')) + ' | latest cycle record |\n| input_task_type | ' + str(decision.get('input_task_type')) + ' | curator input task |\n| next_role | ' + next_role + ' | ' + reason + ' |\n| status | ' + status + ' | orchestrator decision result |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem542_2_real_orchestrator_harness.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-542.2 ' + ('PASS' if blocker is None else 'BLOCKER') + ': orchestrator derived next_role=' + next_role + ' from task_type=development.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(base/'curator_input_task.json'), str(base/'orchestrator_decision_1.json'), str(transport), str(role_state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-542.2 orchestrator harness derived next role from curator intake')
"""
No issue comments.
